subcodes.first_line: The mention of thy name hath been made before the Wronged One, and for thee hath been revealed this perspicuous Tablet, every letter of which beareth witness that the Day is come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکر ذکرک لدی المظلوم و نزل لک هذا اللوح المبین الذی یشهد کل حرف منه قد اتی الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @study; deepening, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
